heading: Fund for WTO dispute settlements
label: 3539 Fund for WTO dispute settlements
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Trade Act of 2002, and not as part of the Uruguay Round Agreements Act which enacted this chapter.

children.heading: Establishment of fund
children.label: a Establishment of fund
children.text: There is established in the Treasury a fund for the payment of settlements under this section.

children.heading: Authority of USTR to pay settlements
children.label: b Authority of USTR to pay settlements

children.text: in the case of a total or partial settlement in an amount of not more than $10,000,000, the Trade Representative certifies to the Secretary of the Treasury that the settlement is in the best interests of the United States; and

in the case of a total or partial settlement in an amount of more than $10,000,000, the Trade Representative certifies to the Congress that the settlement is in the best interests of the United States.
amounts equivalent to amounts recovered by the United States pursuant to the settlement of disputes pursuant to proceedings under the auspices of the World Trade Organization.

children.heading: Management of fund
children.label: d Management of fund
children.text: Sections 9601 and 9602(b) of title 26 shall apply to the fund established under subsection (a) to the same extent as such provisions apply to trust funds established under subchapter A of chapter 98 of such title.
